title: OcexInvoice
description: An OCEX invoice document, equivalent to EDI 810. Represents a request for payment from a vendor to a buyer for goods or services delivered.

type.description: Discriminator field identifying this as an invoice document.

sender.description: The party sending this invoice (typically the vendor).

receiver.description: The party receiving this invoice (typically the buyer).

documentDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which the invoice was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).

invoiceNumber.description: Vendor-assigned invoice number, unique within the sender's system.

purchaseOrderRef.description: Optional reference to the buyer's purchase order number.

lineItems.description: One or more invoiced line items.

tax.description: Total tax amount applied to this invoice.

total.description: Grand total amount due, inclusive of all taxes and fees.

shipTo.description: Optional ship-to address for the invoiced goods.

billTo.description: Optional bill-to address for the invoice recipient.

dueDate.description: ISO 8601 date by which payment is due (YYYY-MM-DD).

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for extension or passthrough data.
